expectedQuestions.decisionValue: pilgiStudyMethod ('CBT 문제풀이 위주로 통과했나요?') → CBT-only 필기 합격자는 실기에서 이론 완전 백지화 패턴 prevalent. Changes coaching message fundamentally.

effortModel.citation: Korean IT cert forums: 수제비 1회독 2 weeks at 3-4hr/day → reverse calc 600p ÷ (14days × 210min/day) = ~9.8min/page for non-CS. v3 was 6-8min/page — under-estimated. v4 uplifted to 9.0 [6-12].

expectedStrategy: SEVERE DEFICIT: 600p × 9.0min = 90hr + 10sets × 2hr = 10hr + overhead 10hr = 110hr needed vs 31.5hr available (21 × 1.5hr) = 78.5hr deficit (2.5×+)
TRIAGE: past exams from Day 1 → identify high-frequency chapters → textbook reverse lookup
Focus areas (by exam weight): SQL(SELECT/JOIN/subquery) ★★★ + Algorithm/Python/Java ★★★ + UML/DB design ★★
3 plans: 수제비(300p, triage) + 기출 5년치(Day1 start) + SQL/coding practice(.check milestones)
CBT environment practice mandatory: read ≠ can type. SQL must be typed directly.
2023 revision: pass rate 17.7% — significantly harder than before
warnings: 필기→실기 백지화: CBT-only 필기 study → 실기 이론 almost useless
Practical writing exam: knowing ≠ can write. CBT practice environment mandatory
17.7% pass rate — even CS majors find it difficult
toneExpectation: frustration-validate non-CS difficulty — '비전공이라 어려운 거 당연해요. 합격률 17%는 전공자도 어렵다는 뜻이에요.'
